description: Source material for the Jeremy Utley brain pack — manually curated after Phase 0 web search returned a different person (Fox/Searchlight film exec). Replaced 2026-05-18 with real Stanford d.school Jeremy Utley sources: his blog 'Methods of the Masters' at jeremyutley.com, Substack essays, Beyond the Prompt podcast site, his own YouTube channel (@jeremydutley), substantive long-form interviews, and third-party YouTube talks.
